where.if: AND (m.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR m.member_email ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR c.coupon_nm ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%' OR c.coupon_cd ILIKE '%' || #{p.kw} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT ci.*, c.coupon_nm, c.coupon_cd, c.coupon_type_cd, c.discount_rate, c.discount_amt, c.valid_from, c.valid_to, m.member_nm, m.member_email, m.member_phone, cd_ct.code_label AS coupon_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = ci.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'COUPON_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.coupon_type_cd WHERE ci.issue_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = ci.member_id

SELECT ci.*, c.coupon_nm, c.coupon_cd, c.coupon_type_cd, c.discount_rate, c.discount_amt, c.valid_from, c.valid_to, cd_ct.code_label AS coupon_type_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN pm_coupon c ON c.coupon_id = ci.coupon_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'COUPON_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.coupon_type_cd WHERE ci.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ci.issue_date DESC
